_comment: WC2026 Group A, MD3 (simultaneous). Standings before: Mexico 6, South Korea 3 (2-1 Czech, 0-1 Mexico), Czech 1, South Africa 1 (0-2 Mexico, 1-1 Czech). RECALIBRATED: South Africa is VIRTUALLY ELIMINATED and does NOT control its own fate, AND its 1-1 with Czech was an isolated goal after being dominated all match -> the scoreline flattered them; real attacking output much lower, defense shakier. So South Africa is weaker AND flatter than the result suggests. South Korea (needs the win to go through, depends on itself) becomes a clearer favourite. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: South Korea (3 pts) wins to qualify and controls its own fate. South Africa (1 pt) is virtually eliminated and does not depend on itself -> flat motivation; it was dominated by Czech and drew on an isolated goal.

home.name: South Korea
notes: Organized, technical Asian side; beat Czech 2-1, lost narrowly to Mexico. Needs the win and controls its fate. attack 1.18.
Faces a weak, flat opponent -> low South Africa lambda. defense 0.92.
On the front foot vs a demoralized side -> clearer favourite.

away.name: South Africa
notes: Virtually eliminated, does not depend on itself -> flat motivation, context 0.95.
Its 1-1 with Czech was an ISOLATED goal after being dominated all match -> real attacking output much lower than the result. attack 0.68.
Shakier than 1 GA suggests (was outplayed). defense 1.10.
